title: Infrastructure Engineer I
description: Salesforce, the world's leading CRM platform, seeks an Infrastructure Engineer I to support our cloud operations at scale. Working hybrid in Atlanta, you'll manage servers, troubleshoot infrastructure issues, and contribute to system reliability. Help power the platform serving millions of Salesforce customers globally.
responsibilities: Monitor and maintain cloud infrastructure and server systems
Implement infrastructure automation and monitoring tools
Collaborate with teams on capacity planning and optimization
Maintain documentation and runbooks for infrastructure

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Employee benefits including equipment and wellness
